name: Software License Agreement
description: Common Paper standard Software License Agreement granting a customer a license to install and use software for permitted uses.

fields.label: Order Date
fields.help: The date the Order Form is entered into.

fields.label: Effective Date
fields.help: The date the Framework Terms take effect.

fields.label: Subscription Period
fields.help: The duration of the license subscription (e.g. 1 year, January 1 – December 31, 2025).

fields.label: Non-Renewal Notice Date
fields.help: The deadline by which either party must notify the other of intent not to renew.

fields.label: Software
fields.help: The name and version (if applicable) of the software being licensed.

fields.label: Permitted Uses
fields.help: The specific purposes for which Customer may use the Software.

fields.label: License Limits
fields.help: Any quantitative or qualitative restrictions on use (e.g. number of users, seats, instances, or geographic limits).

fields.label: Payment Process
fields.help: How Fees will be collected — by invoice or automatic charge.

fields.label: Warranty Period
fields.help: The period during which Provider warrants the Software will substantially conform to Documentation (e.g. 90 days from delivery).

fields.label: Additional Warranties
fields.help: Any additional warranties each party makes beyond the standard mutual representations.

fields.label: General Cap Amount
fields.help: The maximum total cumulative liability of each party for all claims under the Agreement.

fields.label: Increased Cap Amount
fields.help: The higher liability cap that applies to Increased Claims, if any.

fields.label: Increased Claims
fields.help: The categories of claims subject to the Increased Cap Amount rather than the General Cap Amount.

fields.label: Unlimited Claims
fields.help: The categories of claims that are not subject to any liability cap.

fields.label: Deletion Procedure
fields.help: Steps Customer must follow to remove the Software upon expiration or termination.

fields.label: Governing Law
fields.help: The jurisdiction whose law governs this Agreement (e.g. Delaware).

fields.label: Chosen Courts
fields.help: The courts in which disputes will be brought (e.g. courts of the State of Delaware).
